---
title: "About me"

    
  
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

I'm a Mathematical Statistician at the National Science Foundation (views here are mine!). I received my PhD in Neuroscience at the University of Colorado Anschutz Medical Campus in 2020 and then pursued further graduate studies in Statistics at Texas A&M University during postdocs at both CU Anschutz and the NIH. More about that journey [here](https://www.science.org/content/article/search-backup-career-plan-i-found-perfect-fit).

My contact info is [here](CV_2023.pdf).



I built this website with the R package {Distill}, which you can learn more about [here](https://rstudio.github.io/distill/).
